lsp.justification: Mostly matches the GT on the important data items: per-worker bio_jobs/bio_jobs_counter protected by bio_mutex[worker], separate bio_mutex_comp for bio_comp_list, no mutex for job_comp_pipe, redisAtomic fields, and immutable server.bio_cpulist. The real gap is that it explicitly excludes synchronization globals themselves, especially bio_newjob_cond[] and bio_mutex[]/bio_mutex_comp, while the GT counts those as shared globals touched by both threads.
